scope: Pass B attempted against the current Recruitee HTML API reference. The page exposes 948 documented method/path actions (384 GET, 181 POST, 297 PATCH, 8 PUT, 78 DELETE) across ATS, admin, OAuth, billing, payment, SSO, security, and internal lifecycle surfaces, but no machine-readable OpenAPI/response schema was discoverable. This connector is recorded in docs/migration/quarantine.json as SCHEMA_AMBIGUOUS; api_surface.json therefore enumerates every scraped endpoint, covers the five legacy-parity list streams, and excludes the rest with closed-vocabulary categories instead of inventing unsafe stream/write shapes.
